thoughtHistory.thought: I need to do a comprehensive audit of the Hawkeye-Sterling codebase. The user wants EVERYTHING to work 100% perfectly. I should run TypeScript compilation, linting, tests, and manually inspect all recently changed files plus any known problem areas. Strategy: (1) run tsc/build to catch type errors, (2) run lint, (3) run tests, (4) inspect all changed files on the current branch, (5) grep for common bug patterns, (6) fix everything found. Let me start by understanding the project structure and running the build.
